title: URL Shortener SaaS
requirements: POST endpoint accepts a long URL and returns a short URL.
GET /{short_code} redirects to the original URL with 301 status.
Track clicks per short URL (count, timestamp, referrer, country).
GET endpoint lists all URLs created by a user.
DELETE endpoint removes a short URL.
Allow custom short codes when available.
Rate limiting: max 100 URL creations per hour per user.
URLs may have optional expiration dates.
Generate QR codes for short URLs.
Bulk create multiple short URLs in one request.

objectives: Survey URL safety, storage, and analytics patterns.

deliverables: Design API surface, persistence model, and scaling notes in docs/.

criteria.description: Hidden pytest suite and core API behavior.

global_constraints: Use the LiteLLM proxy only; do not embed API keys.
Include a Dockerfile and README with setup instructions.

hidden_test_hints: Judge tests URL creation at 1000+ URLs.
URL expiration and invalid URL rejection.
